title: Long Island Sound Restoration and Stewardship Reauthorization Act of 2025
short_title: Long Island Sound Restoration and Stewardship Reauthorization Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Water Resources and Environment.
crs_summary: Long Island Sound Restoration and Stewardship Reauthorization Act of 2025 This bill reauthorizes the Environmental Protection Agency's Long Island Sound programs through FY2029. The programs, which include a stewardship grant program, focus on conserving and restoring the estuary off the coast of New York and Connecticut.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Water Resources and Environment.
